title: lepidium divaricatum var. subdentatum
intro: Lepidium divaricatum var. subdentatum, also known as cress or pepperwort, is a variety of the Lepidium divaricatum plant, which belongs to the mustard family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lepidium divaricatum var. subdentatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
